body_txt: This is when a crewmember, executive or even the creator for a show makes an appearance in a part that would ordinarily be cast with a professional actor — or the crewmember is also an actor. This may start out as a Creator Cameo , with their original "extra" part becoming an Ascended Extra . It is extremely common for productions to have the same people do multiple jobs to cut costs, particularly if the production has No Budget :  See also Directed by Cast Member . Not to be confused with Fallen Creator . Or God in Human Form . Or Author Guest Spot , though both involve authors interacting with the world they're working on in some way or another.
